auditEntries.after: Destination record not chosen yet

auditEntries.before: No human-readable proof is attached yet.

auditEntries.before: Required for Reject, optional for Approve/Apply
auditEntries.after: Reject requires a reason; approve or apply can include a note
auditEntries.proofText: Reject requires a reason; approve or apply can include a note

auditEntries.proofText: Needs human decision

auditEntries.after: Approved, not applied
auditEntries.proofText: Approved, not applied

auditEntries.rule: Inputs identify the object being searched.

auditEntries.after: Backlog could not load. No cards were changed. Details:

auditEntries.after: Loading runtime health.
auditEntries.proofText: Loading runtime health.

auditEntries.before: Operator view for jobs, LLM routes, extraction targets, source-crawl queues, and low-level runtime checks.
auditEntries.after: Live diagnostic view for the dashboard, worker, jobs, LLM routes, extraction targets, and source-crawl queues.
auditEntries.proofText: Live diagnostic view for the dashboard, worker, jobs, LLM routes, extraction targets, and source-crawl queues.
auditEntries.rule: Hero copy names the live systems being diagnosed.

auditEntries.before: This page earns its place as the operator diagnostic surface for the running system.
auditEntries.after: This page answers what is running, what is stale, and where the next runtime fix belongs.
auditEntries.proofText: This page answers what is running, what is stale, and where the next runtime fix belongs.
auditEntries.rule: Purpose copy answers the operator question.

auditEntries.before: Inspect jobs, schedules, extraction targets, LLM routes, source queues, and low-level runtime state.
auditEntries.after: Check jobs, schedules, extraction targets, LLM routes, source queues, and low-level runtime state.
auditEntries.proofText: Check jobs, schedules, extraction targets, LLM routes, source queues, and low-level runtime state.
auditEntries.rule: Use common verbs before technical nouns.

auditEntries.after: Alerting not built yet
auditEntries.proofText: Alerting not built yet
auditEntries.rule: Known limits are explicit.

auditEntries.before: Read-only check for stale, half-closed, or mismatched backlog cards.
auditEntries.after: Read-only check for stale work, half-closed cards, and backlog records that do not match their proof.
auditEntries.proofText: Read-only check for stale work, half-closed cards, and backlog records that do not match their proof.
auditEntries.rule: Diagnostic copy names the failure class.

auditEntries.after: No visible backlog hygiene findings

auditEntries.after: Files changed
auditEntries.proofText: Files changed

auditEntries.proofText: Latest DB changes

auditEntries.before: This is the overview. It shows the full source map: source systems, validation units, and the connector layer underneath them.
auditEntries.after: Full source map: source systems, validation units, and the connector layer underneath them.
auditEntries.proofText: Full source map: source systems, validation units, and the connector layer underneath them.

auditEntries.before: Repo docs and markdown-backed truth only. Use this lane when you want to see which written packets are signed off, what those packets include, and what is still outside the closure.
auditEntries.after: Repo docs and markdown-backed truth only. Use this lane to see which written packets are signed off, what they include, and what is still outside the closure.
auditEntries.proofText: Repo docs and markdown-backed truth only. Use this lane to see which written packets are signed off, what they include, and what is still outside the closure.
auditEntries.rule: Lane intros say what to use the lane for.

auditEntries.before: Workbook-level sources and their validation units. This is the lane for sheet-by-sheet trust work.
auditEntries.after: Workbook-level sources and validation units. Use this lane for sheet-by-sheet trust work.
auditEntries.proofText: Workbook-level sources and validation units. Use this lane for sheet-by-sheet trust work.
auditEntries.rule: Lane intros use active direction.

auditEntries.before: External systems, APIs, and app-backed business sources. Use this lane when the truth lives outside the repo and outside spreadsheets.
auditEntries.after: External systems, APIs, and app-backed business sources. Use this lane when truth lives outside the repo and outside spreadsheets.
auditEntries.proofText: External systems, APIs, and app-backed business sources. Use this lane when truth lives outside the repo and outside spreadsheets.
auditEntries.rule: Copy removes extra words without changing meaning.

auditEntries.before: Just the pipes. This lane is about access paths and technical reach, not whether the source itself is trusted.
auditEntries.after: Access paths and technical reach only. This lane does not prove the source itself is trusted.
auditEntries.proofText: Access paths and technical reach only. This lane does not prove the source itself is trusted.
auditEntries.rule: Boundary copy avoids metaphor.

auditEntries.before: Signed off and fresh are not the same thing.
auditEntries.after: A source can be readable before it is trusted.
auditEntries.proofText: A source can be readable before it is trusted.
auditEntries.rule: Trust warnings say the operational risk plainly.

auditEntries.proofText: Open the right source view

auditEntries.proofText: How to read this
